(c) The figure in the question has been labelled at different points as shown in the following figure [with diagram]. From the above diagram parallelograms are as follow (i) Parallelograms from the outer figure = О”ABCD, О”AUD, О”GBCH, О”ADHG, О”GHJL, О”IJCB = 6 (ii) Parallelograms from the upper half of the figure = О”AGKE, О”GILK, О”IBFL, О”AILE, О”GBFK, О”ABFE = 6 (iii) Parallelograms from the lower half of the figure = О”EKHD, О”KLJH, О”LFCJ, О”KFCH, О”ELJD, О”EFCD = 6 Therefore, there are a total of 18 parallelograms in the figure. Shortcut Method Number of parallelograms = (3 + 2 + 1) Г— (2 + 1) [в€ґ C = 3 R = 2] = 6 Г— 3 = 18
